definition: Markets cycle between expansion (3-5 candles with increasing range) and contraction (2-3 candles with decreasing range). This rhythm helps predict when the next big move will occur.
depends_on: market_structure (expansion/contraction occur within the structure context)
related_to: CBDR (CBDR range width signals upcoming expansion/contraction)
dealing_range (contraction creates tight dealing ranges that expansion breaks)
cycle: Contraction → Expansion → Contraction → Expansion. After 2-3 contracting candles, expect expansion. After 5+ expanding candles, expect contraction (mean reversion).
trading_rule: Enter during late contraction (before expansion). Exit or reduce during late expansion (before contraction). DO NOT enter during mid-expansion — you're chasing.
how_to_detect: Compare current candle range to average of last 5. If current < 60% of average for 2-3 candles = contraction. If current > 140% for 3+ candles = expansion.
